channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Madhu Mantena & Ira Trivedi Welcome Baby Boy Neel Chaitanya
item.description: Bollywood producer Madhu Mantena and his wife Ira Trivedi welcomed their first child, a baby boy named Neel Chaitanya Mantena, celebrating with a traditional namkaran ceremony. This heartwarming moment reflects how Indian families maintain cultural traditions while embracing modern parenthood in the diaspora.

item.title: Aakhri Sawal Trailer Releases April 30: Sanjay Dutt's New Bollywood Movie 2025
item.description: Sanjay Dutt's Aakhri Sawal trailer drops April 30, 2025, revealing an ambitious historical drama about RSS history. The film is expected to stream on Prime Video or Hotstar after its theatrical run—a must-watch for Indian diaspora seeking quality Bollywood content with cultural significance.

item.title: Geoff Allott Named NZC Chief: What It Means for India Cricket 2026
item.description: Geoff Allott, a former New Zealand pace bowler, takes over as NZC CEO, replacing Scott Weenink. This leadership change signals better strategic planning for New Zealand cricket, making them tougher opponents for India in 2026 bilateral series and ICC tournaments like the Champions Trophy 2025. Indian cricket fans in the US should expect more organized, competitive Kiwi teams ahead.

item.title: Bhuvneshwar Leads Purple Cap Race: IPL 2025 Live Updates
item.description: Bhuvneshwar Kumar is dominating the Purple Cap race with an exceptional 3-wicket haul against Delhi Capitals, while Virat Kohli's resurgence continues as he moves into the top 4 run-scorers in IPL 2025. RCB's combination of explosive batting and death bowling puts them in playoff contention.

item.title: England Women's T20 World Cup Squad 2025: Sciver-Brunt Leads
item.description: England has named its T20 World Cup squad with Sciver-Brunt as captain and exciting new talent Corteen-Coleman included, while veteran Wyatt-Hodge returns for her eighth World Cup campaign. The balanced squad suggests competitive cricket ahead, and we've broken down exactly how to catch all the action from the US.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Golmaal 5 Updates: Ajay Devgn Shares Ooty Shoot Behind-the-Scenes
item.description: Ajay Devgn shared an exciting behind-the-scenes video from Golmaal 5's Ooty shoot, confirming the iconic ensemble cast is reunited with the franchise's legendary five-seater bike. The comedy sequel is in active production and expected to release in 2026 on major platforms like Amazon Prime Video or Netflix.

item.title: Devil Wears Prada 2 Breaks India Box Office Records in 2026
item.description: Devil Wears Prada 2 breaks box office records in India with 11,000 tickets sold in 24 hours. Here's where US-based Indian diaspora can stream it and whether it's worth watching. Plus, find out how to stay updated on where it's coming to Netflix, Prime Video, and Hotstar.

item.title: AI Tools Reshaping Dating: What Tech Professionals Must Know [2026]
item.description: AI is reshaping online dating, with tech professionals increasingly using ChatGPT and Gemini to craft profiles and messages. But the trend reveals a deeper issue: outsourcing authenticity in dating is training professionals to do the same in careers—where genuine communication is a competitive advantage. The takeaway: optimize for clarity, not deception.

item.title: Rabada Dominates IPL 2025: Purple Cap Race Heats Up
item.description: Rabada's explosive 3/25 bowling spell against CSK has propelled him up the IPL 2025 Purple Cap standings, making the race for the season's leading wicket-taker one of cricket's most thrilling narratives. US-based Indian cricket fans can watch all IPL action through Willow TV and ESPNcricinfo's live scores.

item.title: Mohsin Khan IPL 2025: LSG Star's 5-Wicket Haul vs KKR
item.description: Mohsin Khan's explosive 5-wicket haul for LSG vs KKR in IPL 2025 has put him firmly on India selectors' radar for ICC Champions Trophy 2025. The speedster's precision and poise under pressure showcase exactly the kind of support pace bowling India needs. If you missed the match due to US time zones, catch highlights on ESPN+ and Willow TV.

item.title: India Cricket Live: NZ vs Bangladesh T20I Highlights 2026
item.description: Bangladesh won the toss and chose to bowl first against an injury-hit New Zealand squad missing captain Tom Latham. With T20I debutants Matthew Fisher and Nathan Smith representing the Kiwis, this match is a critical test of depth. For US-based India cricket fans, it's a reminder that international bilateral cricket remains the ultimate proving ground—and a chance to catch premier T20I action before work.

item.title: AI Ethics in Tech: What the Specsavers Case Means for Your Career [2026]
item.description: A high-profile legal case over misused personal imagery highlights growing liability risks for tech companies deploying AI without ethical safeguards. For Indian engineers, this means auditing AI systems for consent, data privacy, and compliance is now career-critical—and a path to higher salaries and senior roles in 2026.

item.title: Dug Dug Trailer: Ritwik Pareek's Faith Mystery on Streaming 2025
item.description: Dug Dug, a debut film by Ritwik Pareek about a wish-granting bike, explores faith and mystery through a comedy-satire lens. Backed by Anurag Kashyap and acclaimed filmmakers, it's shaping up as one of 2025's must-watch Indian films. Coming soon to Netflix, Prime Video, or Hotstar.

item.title: Rahul's Record 152 in IPL 2025: 'I Had to Catch Up' to T20 Demands
item.description: KL Rahul just rewrote IPL 2025 history with a stunning 152 against Punjab Kings, proving he's mastered modern T20 aggression. His message? In T20 cricket, there's no time to wait — you attack immediately or fall behind. This has major implications for India cricket's upcoming international campaigns.

item.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: IPL 2025 Rising Star, India Cricket Future
item.description: Experts say fast-tracking Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to India cricket would be a mistake. Instead, the Brian Lara strategy—letting him develop through domestic cricket alongside established internationals—offers the best long-term path to international success without derailing promising talent.

item.title: New Zealand vs Bangladesh T20 2026: Under-strength Kiwis Lead
item.description: New Zealand's under-strength squad (many stars at IPL 2025) has taken a 1-0 lead over Bangladesh's returning T20I side, showcasing how replacement players and bench strength can still compete at international level. For Indian diaspora fans in the US balancing multiple cricket formats, this series offers compelling viewing between India cricket score updates.

item.title: Samit Patel Retires: English Cricket Legend Ends 24-Year Career
item.description: English spinning allrounder Samit Patel retires after 24 years, closing one of modern cricket's steadiest careers. Rather than disappearing from the game, he's eyeing coaching and selection roles—potentially becoming a mentor for the next generation of English cricketers.

item.title: Akshay Kumar's Daughter Case: First Arrest Made in 2026
item.description: Authorities arrested a suspect in the sextortion case involving Akshay Kumar's daughter months after the actor publicly disclosed the incident in October 2025. The breakthrough underscores how predators targeting minors online can be caught with proper reporting and investigation, while emphasizing the critical need for digital literacy and open parent-child communication in 2026.

item.title: AI Consciousness Debate 2026: What It Means for Your Tech Career
item.description: Silicon Valley refuses to acknowledge that AI systems may already be exhibiting consciousness-like properties—and this denial is reshaping tech careers. Indian engineers who position themselves as AI managers and governance specialists (rather than competitors with AI) are seeing 15-20% salary premiums and accessing roles that can't be automated. Your 2026 career move: stop treating AI as a tool to master, and start treating it as a system to govern.
